title: selaginella zollingeriana
intro: Selaginella zollingeriana is a type of tropical plant species belonging to the Selaginellaceae family, commonly known as spikemoss. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Selaginella zollingeriana is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine to develop new treatments.
